title: Relaxation Massage
shortDescription: A soothing, gentle massage designed to calm the nervous system, release endorphins and leave you in a deep state of peace and calm.

children.text: Relaxation massage is a therapeutic practice designed to soothe the nervous system and release the body's natural endorphins, resulting in a state of peace and calm. Unlike remedial massage, which focuses on deep, targeted knot release, therapists performing a relaxation massage apply gentle pressure to ease muscle tension. A relaxation massage promotes harmony between the mind and body and is perfect for those seeking to unwind, destress, and rejuvenate.
Types of Relaxation Massage at BodySpace
Swedish Massage

A smooth, gentle, flowing style that promotes relaxation and relieves muscle tension. This style of massage aims to improve circulation and movement range and is ideal for individuals seeking to alleviate everyday stress, muscle stiffness and promote general wellbeing.
Hot Stone Relaxation Massage

The ultimate relaxation experience, hot stone massage involves placing heated stones on key tension areas of the body. This practice promotes a deep sense of calm as the stones' warmth penetrates muscle tissue to ease tension and soothe your body into relaxation and harmony.

seo.metaTitle: Perth Relaxation Massage | Unwind & Relieve Tension | Bodyspace Recovery Studio
seo.metaDescription: Experience a soothing relaxation massage in Jandakot, Perth. Swedish and hot stone massage options. By appointment only. Book online via Fresha.

title: Remedial Massage
shortDescription: Targeted therapeutic massage that addresses damaged, knotted or tense muscles caused by injury, physical exertion or poor posture.

children.text: Remedial massage is a therapeutic technique that targets damaged, knotted, tense or immobile muscles. Therapists focus on problem areas often caused by injury, physical exertion or poor posture to provide relief from discomfort and aid in muscular relaxation and recovery.

Many everyday factors contribute to muscle soreness and tension, from running around after the little ones to sitting at a desk for hours on end. At BodySpace Recovery Studio, our registered therapists can help, offering a range of remedial massage options for Perth clients who need them most.
When Remedial Massage is Right for You

Remedial massage is not just for those who are in pain or injured. It is also highly beneficial for individuals looking to maintain a healthy lifestyle, improve posture, or simply unwind and relax. Consider a remedial massage if you experience persistent muscle tension, are recovering from injury, have limited range of motion, suffer from headaches, or experience neck, back and shoulder pain.
Our Remedial Techniques
Deep Tissue Massage
Targets the deeper layers of muscle and connective tissue to relieve chronic pain and tension.
Sports Massage
Designed for athletes and active individuals to enhance performance, prevent injury and speed up recovery.
Cupping
A traditional therapy using suction cups to increase blood flow, release fascial tension and reduce muscle soreness. Add myofascial cupping to any massage for $10.
Reflexology
Applies targeted pressure to specific points on the feet that correspond to organs and systems throughout the body, promoting whole-body balance and wellbeing.

seo.metaTitle: Perth Remedial Massage | Deep Tissue & Sports Massage | Bodyspace Recovery Studio
seo.metaDescription: Registered remedial massage therapists in Jandakot, Perth. Deep tissue, sports massage, cupping and reflexology. Book online via Fresha.

title: Pregnancy Massage
shortDescription: Gentle, nurturing massage specially designed for expectant mothers to relieve pregnancy-related discomfort and promote deep relaxation.

children.text: Pregnancy massage is a specialised form of therapeutic massage designed to support the health and wellbeing of expectant mothers. Our therapists are trained to work with the unique needs of pregnant clients, using safe positioning and gentle techniques to relieve common pregnancy discomforts such as back pain, swollen feet and emotional stress.
Whether you're in your first, second or third trimester, a pregnancy massage at BodySpace Recovery Studio can provide much-needed relief and help you connect with your changing body.

benefits: Relieves lower back and hip pain
Reduces swelling in feet and ankles

title: Natural Healing – Reiki
shortDescription: A Japanese energy healing technique that promotes relaxation and supports the body's natural ability to heal by channelling universal life energy.

children.text: Reiki is a Japanese healing technique based on the principle that the therapist can channel energy into the client through touch or near-touch, activating the client's natural healing processes and restoring physical and emotional wellbeing.

The word Reiki is made up of two Japanese words — Rei, meaning 'universal life', and Ki, meaning 'energy'. Reiki practitioners believe that when this energy flows freely, the body is better able to heal itself and maintain balance.

Sessions at BodySpace are conducted in a peaceful, private room. You remain fully clothed while the practitioner gently places their hands on or just above specific areas of the body, allowing healing energy to flow where it is most needed.

seo.metaTitle: Reiki Healing Perth | Energy Healing Jandakot | Bodyspace Recovery Studio
seo.metaDescription: Experience Reiki energy healing at Bodyspace Recovery Studio in Jandakot, Perth. Restore balance and support your body's natural healing. Book online.

title: Natural Healing – Chakra Balance
shortDescription: A holistic healing session that works to align and balance the body's seven energy centres, promoting harmony between mind, body and spirit.

children.text: Chakra balancing is a form of energy healing that focuses on channelling energy into the seven chakras — the body's main energy centres. When these energy centres are blocked or out of alignment, it can manifest as physical, emotional or spiritual imbalance.
A chakra balancing session at BodySpace helps to clear these blockages and restore the natural flow of energy throughout the body, leaving you feeling lighter, clearer and more centred.

seo.metaDescription: Chakra balancing sessions in Jandakot, Perth. Align your energy centres and restore harmony to mind, body and spirit. Book at Bodyspace Recovery Studio.

title: Natural Healing – AromaTouch Technique
shortDescription: A clinical approach to essential oil application using dōTERRA oils, combining the power of aromatherapy with gentle touch along the spine and feet.

children.text: The AromaTouch Technique is a clinical approach to essential oil application developed by dōTERRA. It combines the unique benefits of human touch with the power of essential oils to create an overall wellness experience.

Eight specific essential oils are applied in a precise sequence along the spine and the soles of the feet. This technique addresses four systemic constants — stress, immunity, the inflammatory response and autonomic imbalance — helping to bring the body back to a state of homeostasis.
The result is a profoundly relaxing and restorative experience that supports the body's own healing intelligence.

seo.metaTitle: AromaTouch Technique Perth | Essential Oil Therapy | Bodyspace Recovery Studio
seo.metaDescription: Experience the dōTERRA AromaTouch Technique at Bodyspace Recovery Studio in Jandakot, Perth. Book your aromatherapy session online.

title: Natural Healing – Ayurvedic Foot Massage
shortDescription: An ancient Indian foot massage using warm oils to stimulate pressure points, improve circulation and promote deep relaxation from the ground up.

children.text: Ayurvedic foot massage, also known as Padabhyanga, is an ancient Indian healing practice that focuses on the feet as a map of the entire body. Drawing on thousands of years of Ayurvedic wisdom, this treatment uses warm herbal oils and rhythmic massage strokes to stimulate vital pressure points on the feet.

The feet contain thousands of nerve endings that correspond to every organ and system in the body. By working these points, an Ayurvedic foot massage can support the health of the whole body, calm the nervous system and induce deep states of relaxation.

seo.metaTitle: Ayurvedic Foot Massage Perth | Padabhyanga Jandakot | Bodyspace Recovery Studio
seo.metaDescription: Ayurvedic foot massage in Jandakot, Perth. Ancient Indian healing to relax, restore and revitalise. Book at Bodyspace Recovery Studio.

title: Natural Healing – Energy Healing for Children
shortDescription: Gentle, non-invasive energy healing sessions designed specifically for children to support emotional balance, calm anxiety and promote wellbeing.

children.text: Energy healing for children is a gentle, non-invasive therapy designed to support the emotional and physical wellbeing of young people. Children are often highly sensitive to energy and can respond beautifully to these calming, nurturing treatments.

Sessions are tailored to the child's age and needs, creating a safe and comfortable environment where they can relax and receive the healing they need. Parents or guardians are welcome to stay throughout the session.
These sessions can be particularly beneficial for children experiencing anxiety, emotional overwhelm, sleep difficulties or the effects of stress.

benefits: Safe and gentle for all ages

title: Infrared Sauna POD
shortDescription: Step inside the Cocoon Wellness Pod — a state-of-the-art infrared sauna with dry heat, red light therapy, vibratory massage, salt air and aromatherapy in one session.

children.text: Prepare for a trip to bliss and total body recovery inside our infrared cocoon sauna pod. Resembling a rocket ship with its space-age design, this advanced piece of wellness technology takes you on a journey to complete body relaxation and rejuvenation.

A wellness pod session grants you access to many health benefits — from detoxification and muscular recovery to body sculpting, toning and stress reduction. By promoting a purifying sweat, infrared technology warms the body on a cellular level, improving blood circulation and helping the body remove harmful toxins.
5 Therapies in One Session
Infrared Dry Heat

Infrared light is invisible — rather than see it, we feel it as a dry heat. Get that therapeutic and satisfying sweat you desire without feeling overheated or uncomfortable. The heat is set to your personal comfort level. Exposure to dry heat increases heart rate and speeds up blood circulation, boosting metabolism and inducing deep relaxation.
Red Light Therapy

Red light therapy works at the skin's surface to stimulate collagen production, improve skin tone and clarity, and accelerate tissue repair. Combined with the deeper-penetrating infrared heat, the results are comprehensive and transformative.
Full Body Vibratory Massage
The pod's built-in vibratory massage system works in tandem with the heat to loosen tight muscles, stimulate circulation and enhance the overall recovery experience.
Salt Air Therapy
Breathing in salt-infused air during your session supports respiratory health, clears congestion and promotes a sense of calm and clarity.
Aromatherapy
Choose your preferred essential oil blend to enhance your session. Aromatherapy adds an additional layer of relaxation and therapeutic benefit to your pod experience.

seo.metaDescription: Experience the Cocoon Infrared Sauna POD in Jandakot, Perth. Infrared heat, red light therapy, vibratory massage and more. Book online via Fresha.

title: BodyROLL Massage Machine
shortDescription: A full-body roller massage machine that targets all 15 major muscle groups, combining infrared heat and compression to release tension and accelerate recovery.

children.text: The BodyROLL is a high-tech full-body roller massage machine that systematically works through 15 positions, targeting every major muscle group in the body. Sessions are available in 30, 45 or 60 minutes (2, 3 or 4 minutes per position).

Combining infrared heat, compression and mechanical roller massage, the BodyROLL delivers a deeply therapeutic and relaxing experience. It is particularly popular for post-workout recovery, reducing muscle soreness and improving overall flexibility.
Wear comfortable, form-fitting clothing for your session. You'll move through a series of positions on the machine while the rollers work their way through your full body systematically.

benefits: Improves flexibility and range of motion

seo.metaTitle: BodyROLL Massage Machine Perth | Full Body Roller Jandakot | Bodyspace Recovery Studio
seo.metaDescription: Try the BodyROLL full-body roller massage machine at Bodyspace Recovery Studio in Jandakot, Perth. Great for recovery, flexibility and relaxation.

title: NormaTec Recovery Boots
shortDescription: Dynamic compression therapy using NormaTec pneumatic boots to flush lactic acid, reduce soreness and accelerate recovery in the legs.

children.text: NormaTec Recovery Boots use dynamic air compression technology to massage and mobilise fluid in the legs, significantly speeding up the body's natural recovery process. Originally developed for medical use, NormaTec is now widely used by elite athletes and everyday wellness enthusiasts alike.

The boots inflate and deflate in a sequential pattern, mimicking the natural muscle pump of the legs and dramatically increasing circulation. This helps flush out lactic acid and metabolic waste, reduces swelling, and delivers fresh, oxygenated blood to the muscles.
Sit back and relax while the boots do all the work. Sessions are available in 30, 45 or 60 minutes. Perfect post-workout, after a long day on your feet, or as a stand-alone recovery treatment.

benefits: Flushes lactic acid and metabolic waste
Deeply relaxing — perfect for rest days

seo.metaTitle: NormaTec Recovery Boots Perth | Compression Therapy Jandakot | Bodyspace Recovery Studio
seo.metaDescription: NormaTec compression therapy in Jandakot, Perth. Flush lactic acid, reduce soreness and recover faster. Book online at Bodyspace Recovery Studio.

title: Infrared Sauna POD + Shrinking Violet
shortDescription: Combine the power of the Infrared Sauna POD with the Shrinking Violet body wrap for an inch-loss and detoxification treatment that delivers visible results.

children.text: The Shrinking Violet Body Wrap is a professional-grade inch-loss treatment that works by applying a specially formulated lipolysis oil to the body before your Infrared Sauna POD session. The oil penetrates the fat cells and, when combined with the heat of the pod, triggers a process that helps to break down fat and flush toxins from the body.

Many clients report visible inch loss after just one session, with cumulative results improving over a course of treatments. This is not a water loss treatment — the results are genuine and lasting when combined with a healthy lifestyle.
The full session takes approximately 60 minutes including preparation, pod time and aftercare.

faqs.question: How many sessions do I need to see results?
faqs.answer: Many clients see results after their very first session. A course of 5–10 sessions is recommended for more significant and lasting results.

faqs.question: Is the Shrinking Violet treatment safe?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Shrinking Violet oil is made from natural ingredients and is safe for most people. Please advise our team of any skin sensitivities or medical conditions prior to your session.

seo.metaTitle: Shrinking Violet Infrared Sauna POD Perth | Inch Loss Treatment Jandakot
seo.metaDescription: Combine the Shrinking Violet body wrap with the Infrared Sauna POD for visible inch loss and deep detoxification. Book at Bodyspace Recovery Studio, Jandakot.

title: BodyROLL + BodyPOD Combo
shortDescription: Get the best of both worlds — combine a BodyROLL full-body roller massage with an Infrared Sauna POD session for the ultimate recovery experience.

children.text: Why choose one when you can have both? The BodyROLL + BodyPOD Combo gives you a complete recovery session by combining two of our most popular treatments.

Start with the BodyROLL to systematically work through all major muscle groups and loosen tight tissue, then transition into the Infrared Sauna POD to deepen the recovery with heat therapy, red light, vibratory massage and detoxification. The combination dramatically amplifies the benefits of each treatment individually.

children.text: Our Wellness Space is Yours

Body Space Recovery Studio is a family-owned and operated wellness and recovery space you can visit to obtain total body rejuvenation. Regardless of your wellness goals, we provide visitors access to state-of-the-art wellness therapies in Perth. Destress, detox, reduce pain, speed up recovery — there is something for everyone at Body Space.
Located in Jandakot, Cockburn, Perth, we provide you with a supportive space to achieve your wellness goals.
What We Do

We provide world-class wellness machines in a supportive and relaxing space from our home studio. We welcome you into our holistic space where you can receive a plenitude of benefits to optimise your wellbeing.
Why We Do It

The founder of Bodyspace Recovery Studio achieved impressive personal results after using all three wellness machines: the Cocoon Infrared Sauna Pod, the Body Roller Massage Machine and NormaTec Recovery Boots. Overjoyed with her experience and the health benefits obtained, she became passionate about sharing her insight with others.

She realised she had found powerful wellness therapies that people needed to hear about and use for their own personal healing and recovery. It's a wonderful feeling knowing that the service you're providing is making a positive contribution in someone's life.

There are people who suffer in silence, living in a constant state of stress from one day to the next. Guests who come to Body Space often have tension you can see and feel when they walk through the door. Seeing the energetic transformation as their session ends is a beautiful thing indeed.

hero.headline: Relax, Recharge, Recover
hero.subheading: A little something for mind & body

introText: We all need 'me time' to recharge. Recovery from stress, recovery from physical aches and pains — recovery is always a personal experience. This is why our therapies are private and personalised based on your wellness goals. Located in Jandakot, Perth, our wellness studio and spa provides you with a safe space to relax and rejuvenate. State-of-the-art wellness therapy machines on site utilise infrared light therapy to detoxify, destress, recharge and rejuvenate the body and mind.

wellnessGoals.label: Detox
wellnessGoals.description: Get that satisfying transformative sweat at lower temperatures with dry heat infrared sauna. Pores open and release toxins, detoxifying the body deep into the core.

wellnessGoals.label: Weight Loss
wellnessGoals.description: Exposure to dry heat has been shown to boost the metabolism effectively. The body uses calories as fuel instead of storage, raising energy levels and supporting a leaner body.

wellnessGoals.label: Muscle Toning
wellnessGoals.description: Achieve body sculpting with infrared sauna therapy coupled with in-built vibratory massage. Target areas for improved circulation and muscle hypertrophy.

wellnessGoals.label: Recovery
wellnessGoals.description: Reduce post-workout soreness, flush lactic acid and restore your muscles to peak condition with our range of recovery-focused treatments.
